heroDescription: At The Smart Calculator, we value your feedback, questions, and suggestions. Whether you're facing an issue with one of our calculators, have a feature request, or simply want to share your experience, our team is here to listen.
emailSupportDescription: For general inquiries, technical support, or partnership opportunities, reach us at:
websiteFeedbackDescription: Found a bug or calculation error? Please let us know via our feedback form so we can fix it quickly and improve your experience, reach us at:
businessCollaborationDescription: For business inquiries, partnerships, or advertising opportunities, reach us at:
responseTimeDescription: We aim to respond to all emails within 24-48 business hours. During peak times, it may take a bit longer, but we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
help1Description: Report calculation errors or broken features, and we'll investigate and fix them promptly.
help2Description: Suggest new calculators, features, or improvements to enhance your user experience.
help3Description: Explore partnership, sponsorship, and collaboration opportunities with our platform.
socialMediaDescription: Follow us on social media for updates, tips, and calculator news:
